reviews.review_text: The bathroom facilities were terrible they never get cleaned there abusive when you use power even when the manager gave permission I was happy to pay the extra $5 per day it was only used to charge my phone and UHF radio for work she was rude abusive and ignorant I would never recommend this place to stay weather short term or long term the manager should be sacked and someone else would do a better job than what they do

DO NOT VISIT||The caravan park was absolutely terrible. |The photos on here make it look great. |The shower blocks where mostly broken with massive gaps and peak holes. ||The toilet and shower cubical have very small walls and doors, people could easily see over. ||The place was terribily dirty. |Never visit. Im shock this place is allowed to operate, it needs serious renovations and new management.
Great spot we never realised was there.  Will stay again.  Was only one night that's all unfortunately

You get what you pay for.. ee were short on time and last minute booked a cabin to SLEEP in which we did... if you want to hang around your cabin and be a hermit crab this iant the place for you. But somewhere to use to sleep it is.. As for the owner/ manager.. don't take them personally, that's there job... im sure there's not many holidays for them either. But I agree they could use a way better gardener..

Booked as the only place with vacancies close to home & our kids were begging to go camping. |We arrived out of hours, the gentlemen came and greeted us, was friendly and chatty & helpful. Smooth check in process. |The caravan sites are very small!! We had to move our van forward so we didn’t hit the neighbouring van when opening our awning. |Men’s bathroom- needs urgent attention! The stench from the urinal that wasn’t draining, was disgusting! There was an inch of urine in bottom of it. |The ladies bathroom wasn’t as bad, but had a very stale smell. We were glad we were close to home- which is where we returned to shower! ||The park in general needs a good tidy up. Particularly around the permanent resident sites and possibly vacant sites- a lot of overgrown grass. ||BBQ not operational & unable to locate camp kitchen as described on website. ||Didn’t swim in pool, but it looked clean (although dated) as we walked past.

Unfortunately this whole park is run down. The place looks unkept and very unappealing. The amenities smell awful and are in dire need of renovation. Unfortunately while we were there someone keyed our brand new car. We’re not sure who did it but we know it was done there as we washed and polished it that morning before arriving. There were quite a few ‘unusual’ people walking around that did not make us feel very safe. I think they may live there permanently. Either way we could not get out of there quick enough.
Really gruff 'welcome'. Very basic but it was clean. |Permanent resudent wandered around at night yelling and throwing things. |Would not stay again

Arrived at 2pm for check in, was advised I needed to return in 30 minutes due to the cleaner not attending yet. Came back and the cabin was absolutely filthy, stunk, stains on the lounge, mould in the sinks, still dirty from the previous people with dirt and earrings on the floor, used soap in the shower, hair on the table, sticky stuff on the bedside tables and walls. And not to mention the deck is highly unsafe and rusty and the deck boards weren’t secured in properly. Was meant to be a 3 day stay but however only lasted 3 hours. Highly not recommend unless you have poor hygiene.
Been trying to get a partial refund or refund for this unsatisfactory short stay and they will not return any phone calls from myself or booking.com was meant to be a new years holiday from 31st Dec-2nd January

Very dirty amenities caravan sites even though drive through right on top of each other
Waiting for park manager apparently very slow to service front desk
Very untidy surroundings-5 rating

Check reviews before you stay here. A mistake we did not do. Would not recommend this place to anyone. There is no care factor given here. Office stunk of stale cigarettes and no personality from the park "manager". We booked a grass site but was given dirt instead. The toilets have not been cleaned in God knows how long. There were skid marks in all men's toilets and stunk of urine for our entire stay. Ladies toilets were just as bad. Basin full of water for entire stay but looked like it had been like that for a long time. Bins were over flowing as well. Toilet Brushes were left laying on the ground. Sign said if the toilets weren't clean enough to let the office know. Why should we tell you? We are paying for a clean caravan park not to tell you when do to your job. Photos on the website are false advertising and do not represent the caravan park in anyway. Definately not the "best value accommodation in Teralba" as your website states.

Staying for 5 nights.
Toilets on male side had shit and rubbish everywhere.
Toilet bowls filthy.
It has potential but at moment do not bother staying.
Unfortunately we had to stay.
We used toilets at a nearby Bunnings.
Office was a dump.
Lady in office polite enough.
But boy oh boy they need a cleaner.
Pool is green.
Otherwise park is tidy and could be good.
Definitely won't return.
I did notice a review from a year ago the toilets probably haven't been cleaned since.
Also the manager gets spoken to a lot.
Oh well never again.

Avec tous ces mauvais commentaire je ne m'attendais à rien en arrivant, mais j'ai été agréablement surprise.
Le monsieur de l'office est un australien de premier abord un peu froid qui parle dans sa barbe mais au fil du check in il est devenu très doux et à même fait quelques blagues. Un porte-clé est donné à l'arrivée avec les clefs de la barrière, des toilettes/douches et de la piscine.
Les amenities étaient vieilli mais vraiment pas sale par rapport aux commentaires que j'ai pu lire.
La piscine est propre et en bon état.
Les places sont en épi et bien délimité.
La réservation sur le site n'ayant pas fonctionné, on a pris une pré réservation par téléphone dans l'après-midi et sommes arrivée en fin de soirée. Je pensais payé $45 comme annoncé mais j'ai payé $25 pour un voiture roof tent, 2 personnes, sur un site sans électricité ! Très bonne surprise.
Plusieurs personnes vivent dans les bungalows à l'année donc il faut être respectueux niveau bruit.

Le lac est à moins de 5 minutes de marche (faites attention en traversant la voie principale) pour une balade au couché du soleil c'est très agréable.

C'était vraiment bien ! N'ayez pas peur d'y aller !
Quiet and simple caravan park with friendly company around. Rooms not spacious but clean. Perfect for a family budget short stay within the Newcastle area.

I stayed for two nights in total two children and one adult, and unfortunately the experience was very disappointing.

We were told to check in at 3pm, but when we arrived at the office was unattended. We had to call, and when someone finally came over, he could barely say two words to us. When we got to the cabin, there was no bedding at all in the kids’ room, and only two towels provided for all of us. There was no one available in the office to ask for additional bedding or towels, so we had to go without for the entire stay.

The cabin itself was extremely uncomfortable, the air conditioner was far too small and not powerful enough to cool the space, especially in the heat. The fire alarm was hanging from the ceiling, which is a safety concern. There was also nowhere in the park to dispose of rubbish, which made things even more inconvenient.

The pool was the only thing that kept us from leaving to find alternate accommodation, but even that was filthy, full of leaves and debris.

Overall, this stay fell well below expectations for the price we paid, and I hope management will address these issues, so other families don’t have the same experience.

Good location but .... we booked in for 4 nights, drove in unhitched went to toilets and promptly left caravan park, never to return. Have spent over 15000 kms travelling and this is by far the worst caravan park ever. DO NOT GO HERE. SAVE YOUR MONEY

TERRIBLE.
It was very run down with lots of permanent vans in a very poor state with lots of junk in and around them. Near the entrance the permanent residents had nice gardens but it deteriorated the further you moved to the back lots. There were only 4 sites for vans which were large and drive through.

Terrible experience here, run down, dated and dirty and I felt usafe as a female traveller with a child. There was no one to greet us, the office was closed at lunch time when we arrived, the blinds drawn, I had to call and wait for an gentleman to meet us with a key. I was handed old washed and folded bed sheets to put on myself. The permanent residents looked dodgy and scary. It was a very hot day, and the airconditioning was not put on in the cabin for us, the windows were open and the flyscreens had a hole, so there were bugs on the mattress protector and the floor had not been cleaned. The sink had  black mould in it. I rang up and they arranged a cleaner who was lovely and vacumed and got me bug spray and fumigated the place for me. I made sure all the doors were locked and left first thing in the morning

Beds were horrible booked for 4 people was only 2 pillows in the cabin only one bed was made and there was no sheets or blankets for other beds. bathroom around floor of shower was covered in mould.
Only one roll of toilet paper was supplied.
The lounge had stains of bodily fluids visible. Over all horrible place to stay

The manager Lee, and Paul were so friendly and accommodating. The cabin was clean and comfy with a great a/c. Bed was comfortable and you couldn't tell there was a freeway outside the gates. We didn't get to go swimming but the pool looked inviting. Met some lovely people living there too. Its pet friendly and within walking distance to lake macquarie and the local hotel and take aways. Definitely stay again ..

Give it a go!!!  We had a powered drive through site  for 4 x nights. Very quiet park, friendly owners, basic facilities but very reasonable- where else to you get power and water for $40 per night in school holidays. Yeah it hasn’t got the bells and whistles of a “Big 4” but if you want a basic, safe place for a few nights, stop here! Thanks guys, we will be back when next in the area.

So sincerely sorry but if I could out 0 star i would. There is no care at all in the whole place. I'd probably sleep in the pool area over anywhere. The whole place was a dive! The cabins smelt off and we were handed blankets at check in that smelt rotten and bed were stained. We had hair in the bathroom drains. My kids sat on the dining seats and power/ dust came out of them. The look and smell was not a good look or feel to want to stay one bit, so we left.
We will never be back. There is such a big change they need to make otherwise they will closed down. If they think this ok living they need to think again. Don't know how you can take peoples money knowing all this. Not sorry at all! So disappointing!!

Not luxury cabins by any means. Only 2 small bars soap for toiletries. Shower curtain only. floor in bathroom very uneven and dirty. Shower arm leaks. Pots rusty inside and out. Kitchen sink tap leaks. Paid for 3 adults and a dog by mistake, only main bed made up, given sheets and blanket at reception, if you could call it that ( more like a storeroom dump ) for single bed to make up ourselves, which was not needed. Furniture very out of date and shabby. Main double bed very soft sinks in the middle. No complimentary tea, coffee,sugar, milk.
Smoke detector open not working. Screen door broken.
Near train line.
Booked and paid for 2 nights
Left after one. After travelling up and down east coast twice a year we know what to expect from cabins in caravan parks and this one falls very short.

Great location, good site, however, the place is very run down. More permanent residents than campers.|Amenities hadn't been cleaned nor done while we were there, no hot water and no hand soap. |Place needs a revamp, clean up, gardens done etc. |Office seems closed all the time.|Where does the $40 a night go, I wonder.?

Misrepresented. This place is nothing like it looks on the website.
Paid $195 online. Tried to charge us an extra $25 per dog for a cleaning fee not previously disclosed, After discussing this undisclosed charge he became hostile and rude and I felt he threatened harassment by saying he had my phone number if he got into trouble over it.
The place was quite run down and messy, the office looked more like a hoarder's house than a business, the guy was rude, the cabins are run down, falling apart and beat up and not worth the $195 per night. The park in general had a rough, unsafe atmosphere and in the end we didn't even go in and went elsewhere without refund. They should be ashamed asking those prices for the facilities and customer service they offer.

Misrepresented. This place is nothing like it looks on the website.|Paid $195 online. Tried to charge us an extra $25 per dog for a cleaning fee not previously disclosed, After discussing this undisclosed charge he became hostile and rude and I felt he threatened harassment by saying he had my phone number if he got into trouble over it.|The place was quite run down and messy, the office looked more like a hoarder's house than a business, the guy was rude, the cabins are run down, falling apart and beat up and not worth the $195 per night. The park in general had a rough, unsafe atmosphere and in the end we didn't even go in and went elsewhere without refund. They should be ashamed asking those prices for the facilities and customer service they offer.

The dirtiest park we have ever stayed at. Wish I had read the reviews first because our review is exactly the same. Obviously management do NOT care as I can see they respond to everyone saying they will investigate but all reviews for the last 9 years are the same. Lift your game, you have lots of permanent residents you are making good money off. Not one bit of cleaning done in the 5 days we stayed, every bin overflowing! Thankfully we have a nice van and did not have to use the filthy amenities. Full of cobwebs and rubbish. Disgraceful.

You need to update your photos, very deceiving.
Not suitable for 4 adults, should be advertised for family with small children.
No where to put luggage for 4 adults.
Bathroom is way to small to service 4 adults.
The bed was the worst we've ever slept on, you need to use some of the exorbitant amounts of money you charge to update the inroom furnishings.
First impressions are important, this should be reflective in your reception.
Ok for overnight but nothing else.

I used to stay there 20+ years ago and was pleasantly surprised to find that it was very similar to what it was - a great few days for us and our 3 dogs there.  Our cabin was clean and tidy, with everything we needed.  The sheets were wonderfully crisp, clean and colourful.  The pool was so enticing.  The lady who met us and assisted us a few times was lovely.   One of our dogs was in love with her!

The manager is rude and disgusting I approached her today wouldn't even go to the reception office to talk wouldn't stay there if you paid me two, I was polite, and Curtus and she just spoke to me like a dog not even worth the time of day

4/5|We stayed here for a weekend. The accommodation was basic but clean and very affordable. The manager, Lee, was very helpful. We would highly recommend staying here. It is located close to the pub which has great food and atmosphere. Good, basic, affordable accommodation.

I have stayed here several times over the years with my family consisting of little kids, have stayed in several deluxe cabins. Have had no issue with any of them, they are clean and very comfortable for the family, grounds are kept quite nice and the amenities are clean and easy accessible. The kids enjoy the pool and the bbq area for dinner. We love our stays there and are already planning another on soon.

What a dive of a place. I would put 0 if I could.
The manager puts locks on the bins so no one can put there rubbish in.
The place is super untidy , everything is run down.
If you know your own site you would know there is currently a Male managing the site. Whom goes off his head yelling in the park.

This place is absolutely appalling. From start to finish this was an awful experience.|There is no customer service. A disgruntled, grumpy old man works there and basically doesn’t want to be disturbed. My friend and I arrived after 15 hours travel to a dingy, dirty, cockroach infested cabin . There was no toilet paper and the windows and doors didn't lock. Our cabin had obviously been broken into recently, as the cabin walls had dents in them, and there was broken glass lining the window tracks.|Only one of the beds were made, and when we asked for some linen for the second room, my friend was asked why we couldn’t just share a bed.|The linen was old and smelt . The pillow was past it’s used by date. I ended up going out and buying a pillow and a blanket so I could get some sleep, as I was so uncomfortable.|The bins weren’t emptied all week, no bin liners were provided, new towels weren’t offered so we used the same wet towel all week, the oven didn’t work and we had to clean the kitchen before we could use it because it was filthy - full of dust and grime. The couch and dining chairs were uncomfortable and one of chairs was broken.|The place is way overpriced for what is offered! I’ve stayed in 4 star hotels with full service and breakfast included, for less money. It’s a scam!|It feels like a derelict housing commission. NOT WORTH THE STOP!!!

No one was manning the book in office upon arrived. Had pre paid online and waited over an hour for someone to turn up which was the mower man. Delux cabin was only 2 stars out of five. No dishwashing gear to wash up. No tea/ coffee or milk in the fridge. No toilet paper supplied. No where value for money. Wont even consider this place again.

I am a permanent resident paying 280 a week  the rent has gone up twice already since I've been here (less than one year)  it's no where near worth what I'm paying and there putting the the rent up again to 288 a week all of my doors on our cabin are completely busted all our fly screens are cut looks like someone tried to brake in no air con but other place do there is 1 man running the whole show so nothing gets done nothing his a grumpy old man constantly yellong and swearing and hitting
stuff. Makes us feel cery unsafe. it's summer and the pool is locked me and my partner are dying in this heat if we run the fan all day our power bill gets out of control everyone parks where ever they want (although rules clearly state your driveway only) making it hard to get out of my own driveway I hate it here stay away
Also it clearly states on the door long term residents are NOT allowed pets so I've had to surrender my pets that ive had for over a decade only to find the manager hi.self has pets on site. Just not sure how that sets a good example

Teralba Lakeside Caravan is excellently located right next to the water making it ideal for a fishing trip. The rooms were neat and the owner seemed like a good bloke.

However he desperately needs to hire a cleaner/a good cleaner and replace the bed sheets. Hygiene is the only down side of this place. Rubbish littered the lawn outside of our accomodation including a 12 inch piece of broken glass. Mould could be found throughout the cabin and the bed sheets needed to be burnt. Idk if they have been cleaned or not but they were covered in stains. Replacing them with nice white sheets would be an extremely worthy investment for the owner. It’s also summer and the pool was green.

The owner was a nice guy so I hope he turns this place around but it’s not going to happen until he at minimum replaces the sheets with some nice new white ones.

Dirty rooms, torn curtains, had the sheets, pillows and blankets handed to us to make the bed that we had paid to sleep in and waited 45 min to book in. Thank God there was a great pub to eat at close (that is why there is 2 stars in location.

Very deceiving photos on the website. In reality, the park is very run down and in need of major maintenance. The 'deluxe' cabin was old and outdated. It needed a good clean as the walls, floors and shower were filthy. Needed to make up the second bedroom beds myself. Not a big deal, but after 12 hours on the road, was the last thing I felt like doing. Rang to advise we'd be 5 minutes past check in time and was told that was fine however upon arrival, the man was locking up the office an seemed unimpressed to have to check us in after hours (check in closed at 6pm, we arrived at 6:07pm), despite calling ahead to let them know. I get the feeling if we were any later, we would have not been able to check in at all. Definately not a 3 star property, give it a wide berth and spend your money elsewhere.

Was advised by booking.com that it was dog friendly. It isn't, but the lady allowed me to stay.  Cabin was ok but the bathroom had pubic hair in the shower and hairballs in the drainage. Felt like I was going to fall through the floorboards as it had rotted out around the shower cubicle. No tea or coffee supplies (lucky I had my own) but really, for $175!!! (silly me) I am floored that they could charge such a price (they are rated 3 star, but I wouldn't agree).  Sofa was stained and I wouldn't sit on it as it felt grubby.
Mold
First and last time we stay there , bathrooms are disgusting , the place is not kept tidy , alot of noise from the highway

I unfortunately couldn’t get into a different caravan park, so was stuck with this one. The only thing ok was the price.
The amenities block, neither the male or female sides were cleaned for the week we were there. The male toilets were disgusting, with one blocked and the three of the others filthy, leaving only two reasonable.
The hand basins were similar.
The showers were ok, but one had a break in the neck which showered the ceiling as
Well as everything else.
I was warned by a resident to stay back when the trough wash goes off as it sprayed everywhere.
Highly unrecommended!!

Then there was the ladies! My wife had to clean a toilet, shower and hand basin so she could use them while we were there. From the smell when you opened the door the sanitary napkin bins haven’t been emptied in quite some time. The garbage bin inside the amenities also needs to be emptied. The third shower recess needs to have washers changed as the shower is leaking.

My wife and I have been travelling for a while now this is the worse caravan park in Australia I’ve ever stayed in the manager is so rude and it’s the most expensive do your self a favour and do a big detour they don’t even maintain it there’s not even soap in the toilets garbage should be closed down.
Small friendly caravan park, lovely and quiet

Would give 0 stars if i could.
Turned up after a 9 hour drive to be told our spot had been given to someone else who turned up early, They seemed to think it was ok to try a squish us a tiny spot between the toilet and pool. No chance of getting a 8 meter caravan in there though. So we had no choise but find another park that could fit us in on peak times which turned out to be another 5 hours away. When i asked about a refind the guy in the office didnt know how to do it, so he rang a lady who seemed vary short fused and we were asked to wait ten minutes for her to come. Fifteen minutes later we had to move, so i asked  for a call from the owner/manager.
No call happened. I rang again the following day and was told to call back again in half an hour which we did. He was annoyed at this and hung up on us.
I rang back and was told the money would be transgered back that day. Which they refunded 50%. When i rang back and let them know thay only refunded half they explained that due to our cancellation that they dont have to refund half. Now i am annoyed and expressed it which is when he said that i will have to deal with the police and hung up on me.
Place looks like a dump any way so i am glad we didnt stay there and if they think they can hold half my money after booking out our spot which we booked months ago and putting my family through the stress of finding a caravan park in the xmas holidays last minute they have another thing coming.
Ryan

This park has the filthiest amenities that I have ever encountered.
They look like they haven't been cleaned for a very long time

A bit tired but managent polite and accommodating. Apart from the massive domestic from the people staying in the cabin opposite our caravan which exposed our 3 children to the foulest language they have probably heard in their short lives we could not fault the stay. Toilets and showers nice and clean.
